response.overview: The owners of the Cinema Theater have hit the nail on the head with the installation in the park and with the film of the Ravine, a lively and interesting parade of our world, which already runs to mass with a sleepy face and crosses the Bridge of Sighs and leaves the church with a weary air, as it goes down to the bathroom contentedly and happily soaks in the waves. There is a part of the film especially for shoemakers. It is the one about the staircase of the baths, in which only feet are seen parading by, quick and small, fine and ordinary, rushing down the stairs.
response.title: Un paseo por el Barranco
